heading: Regulations; submission; publication; effectiveness
label: 916k Regulations; submission; publication; effectiveness
text: Regulations of the Commission approved and effective in accordance with and article V of the convention shall be submitted for appropriate action or publication in the Federal Register by the Secretary of Commerce and shall become effective with respect to all persons and vessels subject to the jurisdiction of the United States in accordance with the terms of such regulations and the provisions of article V of the convention.section 916b of this title
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of functions to Secretary of Commerce from Secretary of the Interior by Reorg. Plan No. 4 of 1970, see note set out under .section 916 of this title
